title: The Home Towners
writer: George M. Cohan, Addison Burkhard, Murray Roth
actors: Richard Bennett, Doris Kenyon, Robert McWade
plot: The story of Vic Arnold (Richard Bennett), a man who falls in love with Beth Calhoun (Doris Kenyon), a girl half his age, much to the disapproval of an elderly friend, P.H. Bancroft (Robert McWade), who is convinced Beth is a gold...
